name: Lion’s Mane
summary: Traditional herbal medicine with emerging evidence supporting therapeutic applications.
description: Lion’s Mane is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Cognition; Neurobiology. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Neuroprotective Activity, not treatment claims.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Neurotrophic and Neuroprotective Effects of Hericium erinaceus
Lion's Mane Mushroom (Hericium erinaceus): A Neuroprotective Fungus with Antioxidant, Anti-Inflammatory, and Antimicrobial Potential-A Narrative Review
Neuroprotective Herbs for the Management of Alzheimer's Disease
